_doc: Match-level tuning. Mirrors design/gdd/team-assignment.md and design/gdd/respawn-system.md tuning knobs. Server reads at boot.
_anticheat_doc: Server clamps horizontal step per transform packet. max_step = max_horizontal_speed * dt + tolerance. Higher tolerance = more lag-friendly but easier to teleport-cheat.
_flow_doc: Match phase durations. waiting → warmup (when both teams have ≥1) → in_progress → post_match → waiting (reset). Tune for dev vs prod: short values speed iteration; production 5v5 wants warmup=15, duration=600, post=15.
